name: Eldritch Blast
description: You hurl a beam of crackling energy at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Force damage. The Agonizing Blast invocation adds your Charisma modifier to this damage.
scaling: You create more beams at higher levels — two at level 5, three at level 11, four at level 17. (Engine: single-beam for now; multi-beam targeting is a follow-up.)
